steps.title: Identify the initial amount
steps.content: At the start of the observation, when $t=0$, there are $52{,}000$ bacteria. In an exponential model, this is the coefficient.

steps.title: Use the doubling factor
steps.content: Doubling every day means the population is multiplied by $2$ for each increase of $1$ in $t$. The model is $$y=52{,}000(2)^t$$ The answer is D.
